creator: ttsestt@gmail.com
text:
Fix: 

# and this one works
notify 0 {
	match "subsystem" "DEVICE";
	match "type" "ATTACH";
	match "cdev" "ugen[0-9]+.[0-9]+";
	action "/usr/local/etc/rc.d/uhidd start /dev/$cdev";
};
How-To-Repeat: $ devd -Ddf uhidd-devd.conf.sample
